name: Functional Role Assignments
description: Assignment contract and first-pass card-to-functional-role assignments for The Workshop Knowledge Engine.

includes: The data contract for assigning functional role IDs to cards
First-pass card-to-role assignments for resolved card records
Validation expectations for future assignment records
Allowed confidence values and source types
Curated assignment records in the assignments array

assignment_model.description: Each future assignment record describes functional roles a card can perform in deck construction terms. Records are functional, not evaluative, and may include multiple roles for a single card.

evidence: string

validation_rules: role IDs in roles, primary_roles, and secondary_roles must exist in workshop/knowledge/role_taxonomy.json.
roles must contain one or more role IDs for each future assignment record.
primary_roles must be a subset of roles.
secondary_roles must be a subset of roles.
primary_roles and secondary_roles should not overlap.
a card may have multiple roles.
confidence must be one of: low, medium, high.
source_type must be one of: human_curated, taxonomy_inference, project_override.
card_source_ref should identify the canonical card fact source record, such as a Scryfall ID.
assignments must not include analysis conclusions.
assignments must not include synergy maps.
assignments must not include power ranking or importance scores.
project-specific weighting belongs later in project_override_schema.json or project-level knowledge.
